---
title: "Extended Data Figure 6: Body Composition"
author: "Dylan Rausch"
output: html_notebook
---

Body composition (DEXA) data for Glp1rLepr-KO vs control mice across chow
and HFD conditions. Tracks fat mass and body fat percentage over time.

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(cowplot)

# -- Paths ---------------------------------------------------------------------
feeding_file <- here::here("paper/food_intake_analysis/Agrp_Glp1R LepRflox Feeding_TP.DBR 05.2023.xlsx")
out_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/ed_fig6_bodycomp")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# -- Sample groups -------------------------------------------------------------
sample_groups_df <- data.frame(
  SampleID = c(
    "Q0944", "Q0946", "Q0948", "R0084", "R0085", "R0086", "R0089", "R0090", "R0093",
    "Q0941", "Q0942", "Q0943", "Q0945", "Q0949", "Q0950", "R0087", "R0088", "R0091", "R0092"
  ),
  Group = c(rep("Glp1R_LepR_KO", 9), rep("Control", 10))
)

cols <- c("#EBB395", "#97BCDA")
```

## Data Processing

```{r process-dexa}
bf_data <- readxl::read_xlsx(feeding_file, sheet = 10) %>%
  inner_join(sample_groups_df, by = c("Mouse" = "SampleID")) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(
    day = day(date),
    diet = factor(ifelse(day == 3, "Chow", "HFD")),
    diet = relevel(diet, "HFD"),
    time = as.numeric(case_when(day == 14 ~ 1, day == 11 ~ 9, TRUE ~ 0))
  ) %>%
  group_by(mouse) %>%
  arrange(mouse, time) %>%
  mutate(
    chg_fm = fat_mass - lag(fat_mass),
    chg_bw = body_weight - lag(body_weight),
    ratio = chg_fm / chg_bw,
    base = fat_mass[time == 0],
    base_pct = fat_percent[time == 0],
    base_chg = (fat_mass - base) / base * 100
  )
```

## Fat Mass Over Time

```{r model-fat-mass}
mod_fm <- lmer(chg_fm ~ group * factor(day) + (1 | mouse), data = bf_data)
car::Anova(mod_fm)
emmeans(mod_fm, pairwise ~ group | day)
```

### Fat Mass Plot

```{r plot-fat-mass, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
ggplot(bf_data %>% mutate(chg_fm = ifelse(is.na(chg_fm), 0, chg_fm))) +
  aes(x = time, y = fat_mass - base, color = group, fill = group) +
  stat_summary(geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(geom = "line") +
  stat_summary(geom = "point") +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = 8) +
  labs(y = "Total Fat Mass Gained (g)", x = "Weeks From Start of HFD") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:10)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "fat_mass_overtime.pdf"), h = 4, w = 6)
```

## Body Fat Percentage Over Time

```{r model-fat-pct}
mod_pct <- lmerTest::lmer(fat_percent ~ diet * group + (1 | mouse), data = bf_data)
car::Anova(mod_pct)
emmeans(mod_pct, ~ diet * group) %>% pairs()
```

### Fat Percentage Plot

```{r plot-fat-pct, fig.width=6, fig.height=4}
ggplot(bf_data %>% mutate(chg_fm = ifelse(is.na(chg_fm), 0, chg_fm))) +
  aes(x = time, y = fat_percent, color = group, fill = group) +
  stat_summary(geom = "ribbon", alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_summary(geom = "line") +
  stat_summary(geom = "point") +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = 8) +
  labs(y = "Body Fat Percent", x = "Weeks From Start of HFD") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:10)

ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "fat_pct_overtime.pdf"), h = 4, w = 6)
```
